items.question: I had my assistant _____ the documents to all board members yesterday.
items.translation: (Kazałem mojemu asystentowi wysłać dokumenty do wszystkich członków zarządu wczoraj)
items.explanation: 'Have + object + base verb' dla authoritative instruction! Boss-subordinate - delegating task. To work assignment - using authority. 'Have' causative shows position power - able do command. Base verb (bez 'to') indicates direct instruction od superior.

items.question: She got her friends _____ her move the heavy furniture upstairs carefully.
items.translation: (Namówiła swoich przyjaciół żeby pomogli jej przenieść ciężkie meble na górę ostrożnie)
items.explanation: 'Get + object + infinitive' dla persuasion! Convinced - required effort. To peer cooperation - requesting favor. 'Get' implies persuasion was needed - harder niż 'have' (authority) lub 'let' (permission). Infinitive (z 'to') shows obtained agreement - successful convincing.

items.question: The teacher made us _____ the entire long chapter again for better understanding.
items.translation: (Nauczyciel zmusił nas żeby przeczytać cały długi rozdział ponownie dla lepszego zrozumienia)
items.explanation: 'Made us read' compulsory re-reading! No arguing - teacher's order. To pedagogical requirement - ensuring comprehension. 'Make' shows authority exercise - students must comply. Base verb emphasizes non-negotiable nature - educational directive.

items.question: My boss won't let me _____ vacation time during this busy season unfortunately.
items.translation: (Mój szef nie pozwoli mi wziąć urlopu podczas tego zajętego sezonu niestety)
items.explanation: 'Won't let me take' denial of permission! Refused request - work demands. To o work-life conflict - personal needs vs business needs. Negative 'let' shows permission withheld - boss blocking vacation during peak period.

items.question: I'll have someone _____ that broken window as soon as possible tomorrow.
items.translation: (Każę komuś naprawić to zbite okno tak szybko jak możliwe jutro)
items.explanation: 'Have someone fix' delegating repair! Arranging dla other person do work. To maintenance management - coordinating service. 'Have' causative - using influence do get action done. Base verb shows you're arranging ale nie doing yourself.

items.question: She finally got her parents _____ her study abroad for a semester in Europe.
items.translation: (W końcu namówiła swoich rodziców żeby pozwolić jej studiować za granicą przez semestr w Europie)
items.explanation: 'Got parents to let' double causative! Persuaded (get) them TO grant permission (let). To o convincing reluctant guardians. 'Get' + infinitive shows effort needed - wasn't automatic approval. Persistence achieving parental consent.

items.question: Don't make me _____ - this movie is supposed to be a happy comedy!
items.translation: (Nie każ mi płakać - ten film ma być szczęśliwą komedią!)
items.explanation: 'Make me cry' emotional causation! Film so sad że forces tears - involuntary. To o unexpected emotional impact. 'Make' shows power - content compelling reaction. Base verb emphasizes irresistible effect - comedy label misleading.

items.question: The security guard let us _____ early from the building due to emergency situation.
items.translation: (Ochroniarz pozwolił nam wyjść wcześnie z budynku z powodu sytuacji awaryjnej)
items.explanation: 'Let us leave' granting exit permission! Unusual circumstance - early departure allowed. To emergency protocol - flexibility. 'Let' + base verb shows permission granted - normally restricted ale circumstances justified exception.

items.question: I got my brother _____ me with my difficult math homework assignment.
items.translation: (Namówiłem mojego brata żeby mi pomógł z moim trudnym zadaniem matematycznym)
items.explanation: 'Got brother to help' successful persuasion! Convinced do assist - wasn't automatic. To sibling cooperation - requesting smarter brother's help. 'Get' + infinitive pokazuje że required asking - help wasn't volunteered ale obtained przez request.

items.question: The funny clown made all the children _____ with his silly entertaining tricks.
items.translation: (Zabawny klaun sprawił że wszystkie dzieci się śmiały jego głupimi zabawnymi sztuczkami)
items.explanation: 'Made children laugh' causing joy! Entertainment's purpose - producing laughter. To performance success - achieving goal. 'Make' causative shows effectiveness - humor compelling reaction. Base verb emphasizes direct causal power - jokes irresistibly funny.

items.question: Please don't let the dog _____ on the new expensive furniture in living room!
items.translation: (Proszę nie pozwalaj psu skakać na nowych drogich meblach w salonie!)
items.explanation: 'Don't let dog jump' preventing behavior! Withholding permission - protecting furniture. To household rule - training pet. Negative 'let' + base verb denies permission - establishing boundary. Protecting investment od damage.

items.question: The medicine will make you _____ drowsy - don't drive after taking it today!
items.translation: (Lekarstwo sprawi że poczujesz się senny - nie prowadź po wzięciu go dzisiaj!)
items.explanation: 'Make you feel' causing sensation! Side effect - drug-induced drowsiness. To warning - safety precaution. 'Make' causative with sensation verb - medication creating specific physical state. Base verb shows inevitable effect - chemical causation.

items.question: I finally got him _____ the truth about what really happened that night.
items.translation: (W końcu nakłoniłem go żeby powiedzieć prawdę o tym co naprawdę się stało tej nocy)
items.explanation: 'Got him to tell' successful extraction! Persuaded do confess - wasn't willing initially. To interrogation success - breaking resistance. 'Get' + infinitive shows effort required - truth nie voluntarily offered ale obtained przez persistent questioning.

name: Wyrażenia czasowe - until/by/by the time
description: Subtelne różnice w określaniu czasu

items.question: I'll wait here _____ you come back from the store with groceries.
items.translation: (Poczekam tutaj aż wrócisz ze sklepu z zakupami)
items.explanation: 'Until' oznacza czekanie AŻ DO momentu! Continuous waiting ending przy specific event (return). To commitment - won't leave before. 'Until' dla describing duration że extends UP TO point - waiting period defined przez endpoint action.

items.question: Please finish the report _____ Friday deadline - we need it for the meeting.
items.translation: (Proszę skończ raport do piątku - potrzebujemy go na spotkanie)
items.explanation: 'By Friday' oznacza NIE PÓŹNIEJ niż! Deadline - complete before lub na Friday. To work requirement - time limit. 'By' shows endpoint - can finish earlier ale not later. Deadline language - establishing absolute latest acceptable completion time.

items.question: _____ we arrived at the cinema, the movie had already started unfortunately.
items.translation: (Zanim przybyliśmy do kina, film już się zaczął niestety)
items.explanation: 'By the time' pokazuje że jedna akcja finished PRZED drugą! Film started (earlier) zanim arrived (later). To o missed beginning - late arrival. 'By the time' + past perfect pattern - one action completed przed inną past action occurred.

items.question: She studied _____ midnight trying to prepare for the important exam tomorrow.
items.translation: (Uczyła się do północy próbując przygotować się na ważny egzamin jutro)
items.explanation: 'Until midnight' continuous activity! Kept studying UP TO that hour - then stopped. To dedication - late-night cramming. 'Until' pokazuje sustained action reaching endpoint - describing duration extending do specific moment before ceasing.

items.question: I need to submit my application _____ Monday morning to be considered.
items.translation: (Muszę wysłać moją aplikację do poniedziałkowego ranka żeby być rozważanym)
items.explanation: 'By Monday morning' absolute deadline! Latest acceptable submission. To administrative requirement - no extensions. 'By' establishes cut-off - anything after rejected. Competitive process - timely submission essential dla consideration.

items.question: The store is open _____ 9 PM every day including weekends for shopping.
items.translation: (Sklep jest otwarty do 21 każdego dnia włącznie z weekendami na zakupy)
items.explanation: 'Until 9 PM' describes operating hours! Open continuously UP TO closing time. To business hours - availability window. 'Until' dla continuous state (being open) extending do endpoint (closing). Shopping window information.

items.question: _____ you finish reading this book, I'll have finished three others already!
items.translation: (Zanim skończysz czytać tę książkę, ja już skończę trzy inne!)
items.explanation: 'By the time you finish' comparison of completion! Ja faster - will complete more. To competitive playful - comparing speeds. 'By the time' shows one person's future perfect achievement relative do drugiego person's simple future - progress comparison.

items.question: You must pay the bill _____ the end of this month to avoid late fees.
items.translation: (Musisz zapłacić rachunek do końca tego miesiąca żeby uniknąć opłat za opóźnienie)
items.explanation: 'By the end' latest payment date! Deadline avoiding penalties. To financial obligation - timely payment. 'By' establishes absolute latest - can pay earlier ale after triggers fees. Administrative deadline language.

items.question: Please stay seated _____ the seatbelt sign turns off for your safety.
items.translation: (Proszę pozostań w miejscu aż znak pasów zgaśnie dla twojego bezpieczeństwa)
items.explanation: 'Until sign turns off' continuous requirement! Remain seated UP TO release moment. To airline safety - following instructions. 'Until' dla sustained state (seated) że must continue do specific signal (sign off). Flight safety protocol.

items.question: I promise to have the work done _____ tomorrow afternoon latest absolutely.
items.translation: (Obiecuję mieć pracę zrobioną do jutra po południu najpóźniej absolutnie)
items.explanation: 'By tomorrow afternoon' commitment deadline! Completion promised no later than. To work promise - establishing delivery time. 'By' shows maximum timeframe - może finish earlier ale guaranteed not later. Professional commitment language.

items.question: _____ the police arrived, the thieves had already escaped with stolen goods.
items.translation: (Zanim policja przybyła, złodzieje już uciekli z ukradzionymi rzeczami)
items.explanation: 'By the time police arrived' pokazuje sequence! Escape (earlier past perfect) przed arrival (later past). To o criminal timing - got away. 'By the time' + past perfect pattern - first action completed przed second began.

items.question: The offer is valid _____ the end of this week only - act fast!
items.translation: (Oferta jest ważna do końca tego tygodnia tylko - działaj szybko!)
items.explanation: 'Valid until' describes continuation! Offer remains good UP TO deadline. To marketing urgency - limited time. 'Until' shows sustained validity extending do expiration - po tego invalid. Creating scarcity dla motivating action.

items.question: I'll be finished _____ 6 PM, so we can meet for dinner after that.
items.translation: (Skończę do 18, więc możemy się spotkać na kolację po tego)
items.explanation: 'Finished by 6 PM' completion promise! Done nie later than - może earlier. To scheduling coordination - establishing availability. 'By' shows flexibility (before or at) while guaranteeing latest completion - enabling dinner planning.

items.question: She waited patiently _____ all guests had arrived before starting the presentation.
items.translation: (Czekała cierpliwie aż wszyscy goście przybyli przed rozpoczęciem prezentacji)
items.explanation: 'Waited until all arrived' holding dla completeness! Delayed start UP TO full attendance. To courtesy - ensuring no one misses beginning. 'Until' describes waiting extending do condition met (all present) - inclusivity practice.

items.question: _____ I realized my mistake, it was already too late to fix anything!
items.translation: (Zanim zdałem sobie sprawę z mojego błędu, było już za późno żeby cokolwiek naprawić!)
items.explanation: 'By the time I realized' delayed awareness! Discovery (later) po damage done (earlier). To regret o slow recognition. 'By the time' shows realization arrived po point gdzie correction possible - timing tragedy. Too late discovery.

name: Wzory przymiotnik + przyimek
description: Good at, interested in, afraid of, excited about

items.question: She's really good _____ mathematics and always gets top grades in tests.
items.translation: (Jest naprawdę dobra z matematyki i zawsze dostaje najlepsze oceny w testach)
items.explanation: 'Good at' dla umiejętności! Zawsze 'at' z abilities/skills. To compliment - academic strength. Fixed pattern: good/bad/excellent/terrible AT (skill/activity). Nie 'good in' - 'at' standard dla skill descriptions. Talent recognition.

items.question: I'm very interested _____ learning about different cultures and traditions worldwide.
items.translation: (Jestem bardzo zainteresowany uczeniem się o różnych kulturach i tradycjach na świecie)
items.explanation: 'Interested in' dla fascination! Zawsze 'in' - can't change. To expressing curiosity - intellectual appetite. Fixed collocation: interested IN (topic/activity). Nie 'interested about' - 'in' exclusively dla interest expression. Curiosity statement.

items.question: Many people are afraid _____ spiders even though most are completely harmless.
items.translation: (Wiele ludzi boi się pająków chociaż większość jest całkowicie nieszkodliwa)
items.explanation: 'Afraid of' dla fears! Zawsze 'of' - phobia pattern. To common fear - irrational ale widespread. Fixed pattern: afraid/scared/terrified OF (threat/danger). Nie 'afraid from' - 'of' exclusively dla fear objects. Arachnophobia example.

items.question: We're really excited _____ our upcoming vacation trip to the tropical paradise!
items.translation: (Jesteśmy naprawdę podekscytowani naszą nadchodzącą wycieczką wakacyjną do tropikalnego raju!)
items.explanation: 'Excited about' dla anticipation! Zawsze 'about' - future event enthusiasm. To vacation eagerness - positive expectation. Pattern: excited/enthusiastic/thrilled ABOUT (upcoming event). Nie 'excited for' (less common) - 'about' standard dla expressing anticipation.

items.question: He's always late _____ important meetings - it's becoming a serious problem.
items.translation: (Zawsze się spóźnia na ważne spotkania - to staje się poważnym problemem)
items.explanation: 'Late for' wydarzenia! Zawsze 'for' z appointments/events. To complaint - chronic tardiness. Pattern: late FOR (meeting/class/appointment). Nie 'late to' (można by walk TO ale late FOR event). Punctuality issue.

items.question: She's very proud _____ her daughter's academic achievements at university abroad.
items.translation: (Jest bardzo dumna z osiągnięć akademickich swojej córki na uniwersytecie za granicą)
items.explanation: 'Proud of' dla accomplishments! Zawsze 'of' - pride object. To parental pride - celebrating success. Pattern: proud OF (achievement/person). Nie 'proud about' - 'of' exclusively dla expressing pride. Family achievement celebration.

items.question: I'm tired _____ waiting for changes that never seem to come at all!
items.translation: (Jestem zmęczony czekaniem na zmiany które nigdy nie wydają się przychodzić wcale!)
items.explanation: 'Tired of' dla frustration! Exhausted BY (fed up). To expressing frustration - patience depleted. Pattern: tired/sick/weary OF (annoying situation). 'Tired of' + gerund classic dla complaints - worn out BY repeated disappointing experience.

items.question: He's always complaining _____ his low salary but never looks for new jobs.
items.translation: (Zawsze narzeka na swoją niską pensję ale nigdy nie szuka nowych prac)
items.explanation: 'Complain about' dla grievances! Zawsze 'about' - topic of complaint. To frustration - criticizing bez action. Pattern: complain ABOUT (problem/situation). Passive complaining - expressing dissatisfaction ale nie solving. Griping pattern.

items.question: She's responsible _____ managing the entire project budget and timeline carefully.
items.translation: (Jest odpowiedzialna za zarządzanie całym budżetem projektu i harmonogramem starannie)
items.explanation: 'Responsible for' accountability! Zawsze 'for' - duty object. To job description - area of control. Pattern: responsible FOR (task/area/person). Management responsibility - ownership of specific domain. Professional duties.

items.question: I'm sorry _____ being late - traffic was absolutely terrible this morning rush.
items.translation: (Przepraszam za spóźnienie - ruch był absolutnie okropny dziś rano)
items.explanation: 'Sorry for' + gerund dla apologies! Zawsze 'for' z actions. To excuse - explaining lateness. Pattern: sorry FOR + gerund (action regretted). Apologizing dla specific behavior - traffic explanation softens ale responsibility acknowledged.

items.question: He's terrible _____ remembering names - he forgets immediately after introduction!
items.translation: (Jest okropny w zapamiętywaniu imion - zapomina natychmiast po przedstawieniu!)
items.explanation: 'Terrible at' dla weak skills! Zawsze 'at' - inability pattern. To memory weakness - social awkwardness. Pattern: terrible/awful/bad AT (skill/activity). Opposite of 'good at' - same preposition dla negative assessment. Skill deficiency.

items.question: Are you ready _____ the challenging exam tomorrow morning at 9 AM?
items.translation: (Czy jesteś gotowy na wymagający egzamin jutro rano o 9?)
items.explanation: 'Ready for' + noun! Zawsze 'for' z rzeczownikami. Alternatywa: 'ready to' + verb. To preparedness check - exam readiness. Pattern: ready FOR (event/challenge) lub ready TO (action). Z noun używaj 'for' - checking preparation status.

items.question: She's married _____ a famous successful doctor who works at the hospital.
items.translation: (Jest zamężna za słynnym odnoszącym sukcesy lekarzem który pracuje w szpitalu)
items.explanation: 'Married to' spouse! Zawsze 'to' - relationship connection. To status description. Pattern: married TO (person). Nie 'married with' (that's 'married with children' different meaning). Marital status - partner identification.

items.question: I'm worried _____ my sick grandmother's health - she's been unwell for weeks.
items.translation: (Martwię się o zdrowie mojej chorej babci - jest chora od tygodni)
items.explanation: 'Worried about' concern object! Zawsze 'about' - anxiety topic. To family concern - health monitoring. Pattern: worried/concerned/anxious ABOUT (problem/situation/person). Expressing care przez worry - prolonged illness creating stress.

items.question: He's famous _____ his incredible ability to solve complex problems quickly.
items.translation: (Jest słynny z niesamowitej zdolności rozwiązywania złożonych problemów szybko)
items.explanation: 'Famous for' achievement! Zawsze 'for' - reason of fame. To recognition - known skill. Pattern: famous/known FOR (accomplishment/quality). Reputation earned - skill becoming signature. Public recognition của talent.

name: Polecenia i prośby w mowie zależnej
description: Tell/ask/order/advise someone to do

items.question: She told me _____ quietly during the important presentation in conference room.
items.translation: (Powiedziała mi żebym był cicho podczas ważnej prezentacji w sali konferencyjnej)
items.explanation: 'Tell + object + infinitive' dla reported commands! Direct: 'Be quiet!' → reported: 'told me TO be quiet'. To o instruction communication - passing order. Infinitive (z 'to') structure standard dla reporting directives - capturing command essence.

items.question: The doctor advised him _____ smoking immediately for his serious health problems.
items.translation: (Lekarz poradził mu żeby przestał palić natychmiast dla jego poważnych problemów zdrowotnych)
items.explanation: 'Advise + object + infinitive' dla professional recommendations! Medical counsel reported. To health directive - expert guidance. Pattern: advise/recommend/urge + person + TO + action. Professional advice structure - doctor's recommendation communicated.

items.question: My teacher asked me _____ the homework assignment again more carefully this time.
items.translation: (Moja nauczycielka poprosiła mnie żebym zrobił zadanie domowe ponownie bardziej starannie tym razem)
items.explanation: 'Ask + object + infinitive' dla requests! Polite prosba - redo work. To feedback - quality improvement needed. Pattern: ask + person + TO + action. Educational request - teacher seeking better effort. Infinitive captures requested action.

items.question: The police ordered everyone _____ the building immediately due to bomb threat.
items.translation: (Policja kazała wszystkim opuścić budynek natychmiast z powodu zagrożenia bombowego)
items.explanation: 'Order + object + infinitive' dla authoritative commands! Emergency directive - compliance mandatory. To crisis evacuation. Pattern: order/command + people + TO + action. Authority exercise - law enforcement directive requiring immediate obedience.

items.question: She reminded me _____ my umbrella before leaving the house this morning.
items.translation: (Przypomniała mi żebym wziął parasol przed wyjściem z domu dziś rano)
items.explanation: 'Remind + object + infinitive' dla helpful prompts! Memory assistance - preventing forgetfulness. To caring reminder. Pattern: remind + person + TO + action. Thoughtful help - ensuring preparedness. Infinitive shows reminded future action.

items.question: The sign warns visitors _____ careful on the slippery wet stairs outside.
items.translation: (Znak ostrzega odwiedzających żeby byli ostrożni na śliskich mokrych schodach na zewnątrz)
items.explanation: 'Warn + object + infinitive' dla safety alerts! Caution communication - preventing accidents. To public safety. Pattern: warn/caution + people + TO + action. Risk notification - sign advising prudence. Infinitive captures warned behavior.

items.question: My boss expects me _____ the report finished by Friday morning deadline.
items.translation: (Mój szef oczekuje ode mnie żeby mieć raport skończony do piątkowego porannego terminu)
items.explanation: 'Expect + object + infinitive' dla anticipated requirements! Boss's expectation - work obligation. To professional pressure. Pattern: expect + person + TO + deliver. Management expectations - defining subordinate responsibilities. Infinitive shows expected completion.

items.question: She encouraged me _____ for the challenging manager position at the company.
items.translation: (Zachęciła mnie żebym aplikował na wymagające stanowisko menedżera w firmie)
items.explanation: 'Encourage + object + infinitive' dla motivation! Supportive push - confidence boost. To career encouragement. Pattern: encourage/motivate/inspire + person + TO + action. Supportive persuasion - advocating for ambition. Infinitive shows encouraged future action.

items.question: The rules require students _____ uniforms every day without any exceptions allowed.
items.translation: (Zasady wymagają od studentów noszenia uniformów każdego dnia bez żadnych wyjątków)
items.explanation: 'Require + object + infinitive' dla mandatory obligations! School policy - dress code. To institutional requirement. Pattern: require/need + people + TO + comply. Regulation enforcement - no flexibility. Infinitive shows required behavior.

items.question: He persuaded his friends _____ him with the difficult moving process tomorrow.
items.translation: (Przekonał swoich przyjaciół żeby mu pomogli z trudnym procesem przeprowadzki jutro)
items.explanation: Czasownik 'persuade' wymaga konstrukcji: persuade + dopełnienie + to + bezokolicznik. 'He persuaded his friends to help' oznacza, że skutecznie przekonał przyjaciół do udzielenia pomocy.

items.question: The teacher forbade us _____ our phones during the important final examination.
items.translation: (Nauczyciel zabronił nam używania telefonów podczas ważnego egzaminu końcowego)
items.explanation: 'Forbid + object + infinitive' dla prohibitions! Strong ban - rule enforcement. To academic integrity. Pattern: forbid/prohibit/ban + people + TO + action (lub FROM + gerund). Exam rules - preventing cheating. Infinitive shows forbidden action.

items.question: She invited me _____ her birthday party celebration next Saturday evening.
items.translation: (Zaprosiła mnie żebym przyszedł na jej urodzinową imprezę w przyszłą sobotę wieczorem)
items.explanation: 'Invite + object + infinitive' dla social invitations! Welcoming - requesting presence. To party invitation. Pattern: invite + person + TO + attend/come/join. Social inclusion - extending welcome. Infinitive shows invited action - attendance requested.

items.question: The manager allowed employees _____ home early due to the severe weather conditions.
items.translation: (Menedżer pozwolił pracownikom iść do domu wcześnie z powodu ciężkich warunków pogodowych)
items.explanation: 'Allow + object + infinitive' dla permissions! Granting leave - exceptional circumstances. To workplace flexibility. Pattern: allow/permit + people + TO + action. Management discretion - weather emergency accommodation. Infinitive shows permitted early departure.

items.question: He begged me _____ him one more chance to prove himself worthy.
items.translation: (Błagał mnie żebym dał mu jeszcze jedną szansę żeby udowodnić się wartym)
items.explanation: 'Beg + object + infinitive' dla desperate requests! Pleading - urgent appeal. To seeking redemption. Pattern: beg/plead + person + TO + grant. Desperate persuasion - requesting opportunity despite past failure. Infinitive shows desperately requested favor.

items.question: They challenged us _____ a better alternative solution to this complex problem.
items.translation: (Wyzwali nas żebyśmy znaleźli lepsze alternatywne rozwiązanie dla tego złożonego problemu)
items.explanation: 'Challenge + object + infinitive' dla competitive prompts! Dare do better - stimulating effort. To motivational push. Pattern: challenge/dare + people + TO + achieve. Competitive encouragement - spurring innovation. Infinitive shows challenged task.

name: Formy pytań - zaawansowane
description: Negative questions, tag questions in context

items.question: _____ you like some coffee or tea? I'm making some right now for everyone.
items.translation: (Czy chciałbyś trochę kawy lub herbaty? Robię właśnie teraz dla wszystkich)
items.explanation: Negatywne pytanie 'wouldn't you' bardziej grzeczne! Softer niż 'would you' - polite offer. To hospitality - offering refreshments. Negative questions dla polite offers sound less pushy - giving easy 'no' option podczas maintaining warmth.

items.question: You haven't seen my keys anywhere around here, _____ you?
items.translation: (Nie widziałeś moich kluczy gdziekolwiek tutaj, prawda?)
items.explanation: Negatywne główne + pozytywny tag! 'Haven't seen' → 'have you?' Tag matches auxiliary. To desperately seeking - hoping for positive. Negative statement expecting confirmation - searching dla lost items requires checking z everyone.

items.question: _____ he apologize for his extremely rude behavior yesterday at dinner?
items.translation: (Czy nie przeprosił za swoje ekstremalnie niegrzeczne zachowanie wczoraj przy kolacji?)
items.explanation: Negatywne pytanie wyraża surprise! Expected apology że nie came. To criticism disguised jak question - highlighting omission. Negative questions often imply oczekiwany 'yes' answer - używane dla pointing out failures lub unexpected absences.

items.question: It's a beautiful day outside today, _____ it?
items.translation: (To piękny dzień na zewnątrz dzisiaj, prawda?)
items.explanation: Pozytywne statement + negatywny tag! 'It's beautiful' → 'isn't it?' Agreement seeking. To weather appreciation - inviting consensus. Tags seek confirmation - checking if other shares positive assessment. Social bonding przez shared observations.

items.question: You do understand the instructions clearly, _____ you?
items.translation: (Rozumiesz instrukcje wyraźnie, prawda?)
items.explanation: 'Do understand' → 'don't you?' Checking comprehension! Pozytywne z emphatic 'do' → negatywny tag. To verification - ensuring clarity before proceeding. Tag confirming understanding - ważne że everyone on same page before starting.

items.question: _____ it strange that nobody called to confirm the meeting time today?
items.translation: (Czy nie dziwne że nikt nie zadzwonił żeby potwierdzić czas spotkania dzisiaj?)
items.explanation: Negatywne pytanie highlighting oddness! Expected confirmation absent. To expressing puzzlement - situation unusual. Negative questions drawing attention do abnormality - inviting agreement że something's off. Shared confusion o lack of communication.

items.question: She can speak five languages fluently, _____ she?
items.translation: (Ona mówi płynnie w pięciu językach, prawda?)
items.explanation: Modal 'can' → negatywny tag 'can't'! Pozytywne ability statement seeking confirmation. To admiration - impressive skill. Tag z modalnym matches modal - confirming extraordinary linguistic capability. Expressing awe przez confirmation question.

items.question: _____ you think we should postpone the outdoor event due to rain forecast?
items.translation: (Czy nie myślisz że powinniśmy przełożyć outdoor wydarzenie z powodu prognozy deszczu?)
items.explanation: Negatywne pytanie suggesting opinion! Gently proposing postponement - seeking agreement. To diplomatic suggestion. Negative opinion questions soften proposals - less demanding niż statement, inviting input podczas guiding toward view.

items.question: There's nothing we can do about this situation now, _____ there?
items.translation: (Nie ma nic co możemy zrobić o tej sytuacji teraz, prawda?)
items.explanation: 'Nothing' negatywne → pozytywny tag! 'There's nothing' contains negative → 'is there?' To resignation - accepting helplessness. Negative subject words (nothing/nobody/never) flip tag do positive - seeking agreement o futility.

items.question: _____ they offered you the job position yet after all those interviews?
items.translation: (Czy nie zaoferowali ci jeszcze tej posady po wszystkich tych rozmowach?)
items.explanation: Negatywne pytanie o expected event! After mnogie interviews, offer oczekiwany. To expressing impatience - czemu delay? Negative questions highlighting surprising absence - expected progression że hasn't materialized. Frustration o prolonged waiting.

items.question: We should start the meeting now and not wait longer, _____ we?
items.translation: (Powinniśmy zacząć spotkanie teraz i nie czekać dłużej, prawda?)
items.explanation: 'Should start' → 'shouldn't we?' Modal tag! Suggesting action - seeking consensus. To meeting management - proposing proceed. Modal tags match modal - confirming group agreement dla proposed action. Democratic decision-making.

items.question: _____ you be at work right now instead of here at the shopping mall?
items.translation: (Czy nie powinieneś być w pracy właśnie teraz zamiast tutaj w centrum handlowym?)
items.explanation: Negatywne pytanie questioning appropriateness! Expected elsewhere - location suspicious. To polite challenge - pointing out inconsistency. Negative 'should' questions behavior - suggesting current action wrong. Gentle confrontation o questionable priorities.

items.question: Nobody told you about the schedule change yesterday, _____ they?
items.translation: (Nikt ci nie powiedział o zmianie harmonogramu wczoraj, prawda?)
items.explanation: 'Nobody told' negatywne → pozytywny tag! 'Nobody' zawiera negation → 'did they?' To o communication breakdown. Negative subjects (nobody/nothing) require positive tags - confirming suspected lack of information. Sympathizing o being left out.

items.question: Let's take a short break now and continue working after, _____ we?
items.translation: (Weźmy krótką przerwę teraz i kontynuujmy pracę po, dobrze?)
items.explanation: 'Let's' → 'shall we?' Unique tag! Suggestions 'let's' always tag 'shall we?' To group proposal - seeking agreement. Only correct tag dla 'let's' statements - inviting collective action. British primarily ale understood globally.

items.question: _____ anybody call while I was away from the office this afternoon?
items.translation: (Czy ktoś dzwonił kiedy byłem poza biurem dziś po południu?)
items.explanation: Pytanie o possible past event! Neutral inquiry - checking messages. To administrative - catching up. Standard past question - 'did' + anybody - no negativity needed. Simple information seeking o potential calls podczas absence.

name: Wyrażanie opinii - formalnie
description: In my opinion, I believe that, it seems to me

items.question: _____ my opinion, this is the best solution to our current difficult problem.
items.translation: (Moim zdaniem to jest najlepsze rozwiązanie dla naszego obecnego trudnego problemu)
items.explanation: 'In my opinion' formal opinion phrase! Zawsze 'in' - can't change. To business/academic - stating view. Standard opinion expression - 'in my opinion/view' presenting personal assessment formally. Polite disagreement możliwy gdy opinions prefaced this way.

items.question: I _____ that we should invest more resources in employee training and development.
items.translation: (Uważam że powinniśmy inwestować więcej zasobów w szkolenie i rozwój pracowników)
items.explanation: 'I believe that' formal conviction! Present simple dla opinions - nie continuous. To policy recommendation. Standard structure: I believe + that clause. Professional opinion - advocating dla investment. Present tense dla current beliefs.

items.question: It _____ to me that this approach won't work effectively in practice unfortunately.
items.translation: (Wydaje mi się że to podejście nie zadziała efektywnie w praktyce niestety)
items.explanation: 'It seems to me' tentative opinion! Softer niż 'I think' - more humble. To cautious disagreement. Pattern: it seems + that clause. Diplomatic dissent - presenting doubt gently. Perception verb allowing disagreement bez directness.

items.question: _____ my mind, education is the most important investment for future generations.
items.translation: (Moim zdaniem edukacja jest najważniejszą inwestycją dla przyszłych pokoleń)
items.explanation: 'To my mind' formal opinion variant! Similar do 'in my opinion' ale lekko bardziej emphatic. To value statement. Less common niż 'in my opinion' ale equally formal - slightly stronger conviction implied. Philosophical stance.

items.question: I would _____ that we need to reconsider our current marketing strategy entirely.
items.translation: (Powiedziałbym że musimy przemyśleć naszą obecną strategię marketingową całkowicie)
items.explanation: 'I would say' softened assertion! Conditional czyni less blunt. To tentative suggestion. Pattern: I would say/suggest/argue + that clause. Diplomatic proposal - conditional softens directness. Business recommendation tactfully presented.

items.question: _____ point of view, both options have their advantages and disadvantages equally.
items.translation: (Z mojego punktu widzenia obie opcje mają swoje zalety i wady równo)
items.explanation: 'From my point of view' perspective phrase! Zawsze 'from' - spatial metaphor. To balanced assessment. Perspective expressions: 'from my perspective/point of view' presenting angle. Acknowledging multiple valid viewpoints - yours being one.

items.question: I'm _____ to say that I disagree with this proposal for several reasons.
items.translation: (Zmuszony jestem powiedzieć że nie zgadzam się z tą propozycją z kilku powodów)
items.explanation: 'I'm inclined to say' gentle disagreement! Leaning toward opinion - not absolute. To diplomatic dissent. Pattern: inclined to + verb shows tendency bez firmness. Softening disagreement - presenting as inclination nie certainty. Leaving room dla discussion.

items.question: _____ I can tell from the data, sales have increased significantly this quarter.
items.translation: (O ile mogę powiedzieć z danych, sprzedaż wzrosła znacząco w tym kwartale)
items.explanation: 'As far as I can tell' qualified statement! Based na available info - caveat. To cautious reporting. Pattern qualifying claims: as far as I know/can tell. Acknowledging limitations - assessment based na visible data, may be incomplete.

items.question: In my _____, the current policy needs immediate revision and improvement now.
items.translation: (Moim zdaniem obecna polityka potrzebuje natychmiastowej rewizji i poprawy teraz)
items.explanation: 'In my view' variant of 'in my opinion'! Interchangeable - same formality. To policy critique. Alternative opinion expressions - variety w formal writing. View/opinion/estimation all work w 'in my X' pattern. Professional critique language.

items.question: I _____ say that this is one of the best books I've ever read honestly!
items.translation: (Muszę powiedzieć że to jedna z najlepszych książek które kiedykolwiek czytałem szczerze!)
items.explanation: 'I must say' emphatic agreement! Can't help ale comment - compelled. To enthusiastic review. Pattern: must say + that clause. Irresistible urge do share opinion - too impressed nie do comment. Strong positive assessment.

items.question: _____ seems to be a lack of communication between the departments here.
items.translation: (Wydaje się być brak komunikacji między działami tutaj)
items.explanation: 'There seems to be' diplomatic problem identification! Observing issue bez blaming. To organizational critique. Pattern: there seems + to be + problem. Gentle problem-pointing - acknowledging issue exists bez accusatory tone. Professional feedback.

items.question: I personally _____ that more research is needed before making this big decision.
items.translation: (Osobiście uważam że więcej badań jest potrzebnych przed podjęciem tej dużej decyzji)
items.explanation: 'I personally feel' emphasizes individual view! 'Personally' strengthens ownership. To cautious stance. Adding 'personally' do 'feel/think/believe' emphasizes subjective nature - distinguishing your view od possible others. Personal conviction statement.

items.question: _____ my experience, this type of project usually takes longer than initially estimated.
items.translation: (Z mojego doświadczenia ten typ projektu zazwyczaj trwa dłużej niż początkowo szacowano)
items.explanation: 'In my experience' experiential opinion! Based na what lived - credibility. To sharing learned wisdom. Pattern: in my experience + observation. Professional insight - pattern recognition od accumulated history. Authority od practice.

items.question: To be _____, I don't think this plan will work without major significant changes.
items.translation: (Szczerze mówiąc nie myślę że ten plan zadziała bez głównych znaczących zmian)
items.explanation: 'To be honest' candid opinion phrase! Admitting real view - might be unpopular. To frank assessment. Honesty disclaimer - warning potentially unwelcome truth follows. Creates space dla blunt feedback - preparing listener dla criticism.

items.question: It is my _____ that we should proceed cautiously with this risky venture.
items.translation: (Moim przekonaniem jest że powinniśmy postępować ostrożnie z tym ryzykownym przedsięwzięciem)
items.explanation: 'It is my belief that' very formal! Noun structure - highest formality. To serious policy statement. Pattern: it is my belief/conviction + that clause. Academic/legal language - presenting position formally. Weighty opinion requiring noun form.

name: Markery sekwencji
description: First, then, after that, finally, in the end

items.question: _____, mix the flour and sugar together in a large bowl carefully.
items.translation: (Najpierw zmieszaj mąkę i cukier razem w dużej misce starannie)
items.explanation: 'First' zaczyna sequence instructions! Krok początkowy - od czego zacząć. To recipe/instructions - ordered steps. 'First' lub 'firstly' (bardziej formalny) dla initial step. Sequencing czyni instrukcje klarowne - pokazuje porządek operations.

items.question: _____, add the eggs one at a time while mixing continuously and gently.
items.translation: (Następnie dodaj jajka po jednym podczas mieszania ciągle i delikatnie)
items.explanation: 'Then' lub 'next' dla kolejnych kroków! Po pierwszym - second step. To continuation - proceeding through recipe. Sequential connectors: then/next/after that guide przez multi-step process. Clear ordering prevents confusion.

items.question: _____ that, let the mixture rest for about thirty minutes at room temperature.
items.translation: (Po tym pozwól mieszance odpocząć około trzydziestu minut w temperaturze pokojowej)
items.explanation: 'After that' references previous step! Po completion poprzedniego - new instruction. To sequencing - maintaining flow. 'After that' explicitly connects do prior step - showing temporal progression. Recipe timing - patience needed.

items.question: _____, bake in the oven at 180 degrees for approximately forty-five minutes.
items.translation: (Na koniec piecz w piekarniku na 180 stopni około czterdziestu pięciu minut)
items.explanation: 'Finally' dla ostatniego kroku! Concluding instruction - końcowy step. To completion - last action. 'Finally' lub 'lastly' dla final step w sequence. Signals koniec process - no more steps po.

items.question: _____ the beginning, I didn't understand the game rules at all clearly.
items.translation: (Na początku nie rozumiałem zasad gry wcale wyraźnie)
items.explanation: 'At the beginning' dla starting point! Initial state - later changed. To learning curve. 'At the beginning' describes initial phase - confusion normal. Often followed by 'but later understood' - showing progression od incomprehension.

items.question: _____ the end, we decided to cancel the event due to low registration numbers.
items.translation: (W końcu zdecydowaliśmy się odwołać wydarzenie z powodu niskich liczb rejestracji)
items.explanation: 'In the end' final decision po deliberation! After considering - ultimate choice. To conclusion. Different od 'at the end' (final point) - 'in the end' means 'ultimately/finally' po process. Delayed decision terminology.

items.question: To begin _____, let me introduce myself and explain my background briefly.
items.translation: (Na początek pozwólcie mi się przedstawić i wyjaśnić moje pochodzenie krótko)
items.explanation: 'To begin with' formal opening! Starting point - first topic. To presentation structure. Pattern: to begin/start with introduces initial element. Professional communication - signaling sequence start. Sets expectation więcej follows.

items.question: _____, I'd like to thank everyone for attending this important meeting today.
items.translation: (Po pierwsze chciałbym podziękować wszystkim za uczestnictwo w tym ważnym spotkaniu dzisiaj)
items.explanation: 'First of all' emphasizes priority! Before anything else - most important first. To formal opening. Stronger niż simple 'first' - 'of all' adds emphasis. Used dla highlighting paramount point - establishing co must be said before everything else.

items.question: Meanwhile, our competitors were gaining significant market share rapidly during this time.
items.translation: (Tymczasem nasi konkurenci zdobywali znaczący udział w rynku szybko podczas tego czasu)
items.explanation: 'Meanwhile' pokazuje simultaneous events! Podczas gdy jedno działo się, inne też. To parallel narratives. 'Meanwhile' connects concurrent developments - showing multiple things happening razem. Business analysis - acknowledging competitive activity while você busy.

items.question: _____ step is to gather all necessary materials and tools before starting work.
items.translation: (Następnym krokiem jest zebranie wszystkich niezbędnych materiałów i narzędzi przed rozpoczęciem pracy)
items.explanation: 'The next step' formal instruction sequencing! Identifying specific stage - procedural clarity. To technical instructions. 'The next step' more formal niż simple 'next' - used w manuals/procedures. Structured guidance - clear stage identification.

items.question: _____ but not least, I want to thank my family for their constant support.
items.translation: (Ostatnie ale nie mniej ważne chcę podziękować mojej rodzinie za ich stałe wsparcie)
items.explanation: 'Last but not least' idiomatic final mention! Final ale equally important. To acknowledgment - ensuring last isn't forgotten. Fixed phrase - can't change. Used w speeches dla honoring final person/group - emphasizing ich importance despite position.

items.question: To sum _____, I believe this project was a great success overall for everyone.
items.translation: (Podsumowując uważam że ten projekt był wielkim sukcesem ogólnie dla wszystkich)
items.explanation: 'To sum up' conclusion phrase! Zawsze 'up' - summarizing. To closing remarks. Pattern: to sum up + conclusion. Presentation/essay endings - signaling final thoughts. Prepares audience dla condensed main points recap.

items.question: _____ all, there are three main reasons why this strategy will succeed.
items.translation: (W sumie są trzy główne powody dlaczego ta strategia odniesie sukces)
items.explanation: 'In all' totaling phrase! Counting complete set - summary number. To quantifying. 'In all' introduces total count. Used dla giving aggregate po listing items - comprehensive summary number. Totaling function.

items.question: We tried several approaches. _____, we found one that actually worked perfectly!
items.translation: (Próbowaliśmy kilku podejść. Ostatecznie znaleźliśmy jedno które faktycznie działało perfekcyjnie!)
items.explanation: 'Eventually' sukces po attempts! After process - ultimate success. To perseverance reward. 'Eventually' shows passage of time i effort przed achieving - patience paid off. Multiple tries leading do final solution.

items.question: _____ conclusion, I recommend approving this proposal without any further delay now.
items.translation: (Podsumowując polecam zatwierdzenie tej propozycji bez żadnego dalszego opóźnienia teraz)
items.explanation: 'In conclusion' formal ending! Zawsze 'in' - closing phrase. To final recommendation. Standard essay/speech conclusion marker. Signals wrapping up - final thoughts beginning. Professional closure introducing ultimate position lub advice.

name: Wyrażanie zdolności i możliwości
description: Can, could, be able to, manage to - różnice

items.question: I _____ swim when I was only five years old - my father taught me early.
items.translation: (Umiałem pływać kiedy miałem tylko pięć lat - mój ojciec nauczył mnie wcześnie)
items.explanation: 'Could' dla general past ability! Miałeś skill w przeszłości - learned capability. To childhood memory. 'Could' + activity describes possessed ability w past. General skill nie specific occasion - habitual capability.

items.question: Despite the injury, she _____ finish the marathon race yesterday successfully!
items.translation: (Pomimo kontuzji udało jej się skończyć maraton wczoraj pomyślnie!)
items.explanation: 'Managed to' sukces pomimo difficulty! Specific achievement - overcame obstacle. To triumph. 'Managed to' emphasizes effort i difficulty - success wasn't easy ale achieved. Specific occasion victory - highlighting accomplished despite challenges.

items.question: I haven't _____ contact him yet - his phone is always busy or turned off.
items.translation: (Nie udało mi się jeszcze skontaktować z nim - jego telefon jest zawsze zajęty lub wyłączony)
items.explanation: 'Haven't been able to' present perfect inability! Tried ale nie succeeded yet. To ongoing frustration. 'Be able to' w perfect tenses (can't use 'can' w perfect). Continued failure - multiple attempts unsuccessful. Expressing persistent difficulty.

items.question: After months of practice, I _____ finally play this difficult song perfectly!
items.translation: (Po miesiącach praktyki w końcu mogę zagrać tę trudną piosenkę perfekcyjnie!)
items.explanation: 'Can finally play' nowo nabyta ability! Achievement unlocked - skill acquired. To training success. 'Can' + 'finally' celebrates reaching competence. Learning curve completed - now capable. Present ability announcement.

items.question: Will you _____ attend the conference next month in the capital city?
items.translation: (Czy będziesz mógł uczestniczyć w konferencji w przyszłym miesiącu w stolicy?)
items.explanation: 'Will be able to' future capability! Can't use 'will can' - must use 'be able to'. To scheduling inquiry. Future tense requires 'be able to' (can't use 'can' w future form). Availability question - checking future possibility.

items.question: I _____ escape from the burning building through the back emergency exit!
items.translation: (Udało mi się uciec z płonącego budynku przez tylne wyjście awaryjne!)
items.explanation: 'Managed to escape' dramatic survival! Specific life-threatening situation - successful. To emergency success. 'Managed to' dla specific difficult achievements - emphasizes effort i difficulty. Heroic specific occasion - escape despite danger.

items.question: She _____ speak three languages fluently even as a young child growing up.
items.translation: (Umiała mówić płynnie w trzech językach nawet jako młode dziecko dorastające)
items.explanation: 'Could speak' general childhood ability! Multilingual od young - impressive. To innate/learned talent. 'Could' dla past general abilities - possessed skill over period. Early language acquisition - sustained capability przez childhood.

items.question: I hope I'll _____ help you with your project if I have free time.
items.translation: (Mam nadzieję że będę mógł ci pomóc z twoim projektem jeśli będę miał wolny czas)
items.explanation: 'Will be able to help' conditional future! Depends na time availability. To tentative offer. Future capability requiring 'be able to' (can't use 'can' w future). Conditional assistance - willing jeśli circumstances allow.

items.question: After trying for hours, I _____ finally solve the extremely difficult puzzle!
items.translation: (Po próbowaniu przez godziny w końcu udało mi się rozwiązać ekstremalnie trudną łamigłówkę!)
items.explanation: 'Managed to solve' po prolonged effort! Persistence zwyciężyła - breakthrough. To puzzle triumph. 'Managed to' dla achievements requiring sustained effort - emphasizes struggle preceding success. Specific challenging completion.

items.question: _____ you help me carry these heavy boxes upstairs to the second floor?
items.translation: (Czy możesz mi pomóc przenieść te ciężkie pudła na górę na drugie piętro?)
items.explanation: 'Can you help' present request! Current moment - asking dla immediate assistance. To favor request. 'Can' dla present ability questions - checking current availability. 'Could' byłoby bardziej grzeczne ale 'can' standard casualny request.

items.question: I've never _____ understand why he made that strange decision back then.
items.translation: (Nigdy nie byłem w stanie zrozumieć dlaczego podjął tę dziwną decyzję wtedy)
items.explanation: 'Never been able to understand' persistent inability! Ongoing puzzle - still don't get. To lasting confusion. Present perfect z 'be able to' (can't use 'can' w perfect). Continued incomprehension - mystery remains unsolved.

items.question: After the accident, he wasn't _____ walk for several months during recovery.
items.translation: (Po wypadku nie był w stanie chodzić przez kilka miesięcy podczas rekonwalescencji)
items.explanation: 'Wasn't able to walk' temporary inability! Injury-caused limitation - lost capability. To recovery period. 'Be able to' w past dla specific period inabilities. Medical context - temporary loss of function. Rehabilitation journey.

items.question: I _____ usually remember faces well, but I'm terrible with names unfortunately.
items.translation: (Zazwyczaj potrafię zapamiętywać twarze dobrze, ale jestem okropny z imionami niestety)
items.explanation: 'Can usually remember' habitual ability! Regular skill - reliable capability. To strengths/weaknesses. 'Can' + 'usually' dla describing typical abilities - what normally capable of. Memory pattern - visual strong, verbal weak.

items.question: Despite feeling sick, I _____ complete all my work tasks yesterday successfully.
items.translation: (Pomimo czucia choroby udało mi się ukończyć wszystkie moje zadania wczoraj pomyślnie)
items.explanation: 'Was able to complete' specific success! One occasion - sick ale finished. To dedication. 'Was able to' lub 'managed to' dla specific achievements. Both emphasize particular accomplishment - choosing depends na nuance (managed emphasizes difficulty more).

items.question: I wish I _____ speak Spanish fluently like my multilingual colleague does!
items.translation: (Chciałbym móc mówić płynnie po hiszpańsku jak mój wielojęzyczny kolega!)
items.explanation: 'Wish I could' unrealized desire! Don't speak (reality) ale want do (wish). To aspiration. 'Wish' + 'could' standard dla expressing desired abilities currently lacking. Language learning motivation - admiring others' skills.

name: Złożone tryby warunkowe - mieszane
description: Advanced mixing of time frames

items.question: If I _____ more time yesterday, I would be finished with work now!
items.translation: (Gdybym miał więcej czasu wczoraj, byłbym teraz skończony z pracą!)
items.explanation: Mixed conditional: past condition affecting present! 'Had had more time' (past perfect - wczoraj) → 'would be finished' (present - teraz). To o time management regret - wczorajszy brak czasu wpływa na dzisiejszy status incomplete. Past perfect pokazuje missed past opportunity affecting current state.

items.question: If she _____ more confident generally, she would have applied for that promotion.
items.translation: (Gdyby była bardziej pewna siebie ogólnie, aplikowałaby na ten awans)
items.explanation: Mixed conditional: present characteristic affecting past! 'If she were confident' (present trait) → 'would have applied' (past action). To o personality limiting opportunities - general lack of confidence prevented specific past application. Character determines choices.

items.question: If he had studied medicine, he _____ be a doctor now instead of teacher.
items.translation: (Gdyby studiował medycynę, byłby teraz lekarzem zamiast nauczycielem)
items.explanation: Past education choice affecting present career! 'Had studied' (past decision) → 'would be' (present profession). To career path reflection - educational choices shaping current reality. Past perfect decision creates hypothetical present identity - sliding doors moment.

items.question: If I _____ allergic to cats, I would have adopted that kitten immediately yesterday.
items.translation: (Gdybym nie był uczulony na koty, adoptowałbym tego kociaka natychmiast wczoraj)
items.explanation: Present permanent condition preventing past action! 'If I weren't allergic' (ongoing condition) → 'would have adopted' (past missed opportunity). To o health limitations - current allergy blocked past desire. Permanent state preventing specific past action.

items.question: If we hadn't taken that wrong turn, we _____ be lost right now in middle of nowhere!
items.translation: (Gdybyśmy nie skręcili źle, nie bylibyśmy zgubieni właśnie teraz w środku niczego!)
items.explanation: Past navigation error affecting present location! 'Hadn't taken wrong turn' (past mistake) → 'wouldn't be lost' (present consequence). To travel frustration - błąd nawigacyjny causing current problem. Past perfect mistake creates present predicament - wish could undo.

items.question: If you _____ more organized usually, you wouldn't have missed the deadline yesterday.
items.translation: (Gdybyś był bardziej zorganizowany zazwyczaj, nie przegapiłbyś terminu wczoraj)
items.explanation: General trait affecting specific past failure! 'If you were organized' (character) → 'wouldn't have missed' (specific past event). To criticism - personality flaw caused particular mistake. Present characteristic determines past actions - ongoing trait's consequences.

items.question: If I had accepted that job offer, I _____ be living in London right now!
items.translation: (Gdybym przyjął tę ofertę pracy, mieszkałbym w Londynie właśnie teraz!)
items.explanation: Past decision affecting present location! 'Had accepted' (past choice) → 'would be living' (present situation). To career regret - imagining alternative current life. Past perfect decision point creating completely different present reality - major life fork.

items.question: If she _____ afraid of heights, she would have gone skydiving with us yesterday.
items.translation: (Gdyby nie bała się wysokości, poszłaby na skoki spadochronowe z nami wczoraj)
items.explanation: Present fear preventing past adventure! 'If she weren't afraid' (current phobia) → 'would have gone' (past missed experience). To o lasting fears blocking opportunities - permanent anxiety prevented specific past activity. Phobia's limiting effect.

items.question: If they had invested wisely earlier, they _____ have financial problems now.
items.translation: (Gdyby zainwestowali mądrze wcześniej, nie mieliby problemów finansowych teraz)
items.explanation: Past financial choices affecting present! 'Had invested wisely' (past decisions) → 'wouldn't have problems' (present state). To investment regret - poor past choices creating current stress. Past perfect prudence would prevent present predicament - hindsight o money.

items.question: If you _____ more careful generally, you wouldn't have broken that expensive vase.
items.translation: (Gdybyś był bardziej ostrożny ogólnie, nie zbiłbyś tego drogiego wazonu)
items.explanation: General carelessness causing specific accident! 'If you were careful' (character trait) → 'wouldn't have broken' (past incident). To criticism - personality flaw led do damage. Present behavioral pattern responsible dla past mishap.

items.question: If I had known about the party, I _____ be here celebrating with you all now!
items.translation: (Gdybym wiedział o imprezie, byłbym tutaj świętujący z wami wszystkimi teraz!)
items.explanation: Past lack of knowledge affecting present! 'Had known' (wasn't informed) → 'would be here' (present attendance). To o missed social event - information gap caused absence. Past perfect awareness would create present participation.

items.question: If he _____ so stubborn always, he would have listened to our good advice.
items.translation: (Gdyby nie był tak uparty zawsze, posłuchałby naszej dobrej rady)
items.explanation: Present personality trait affecting past! 'If he weren't stubborn' (ongoing characteristic) → 'would have listened' (past would-be action). To o character blocking wisdom - stubbornness prevented accepting guidance. Personality flaw's historical consequences.

items.question: If we had left on time this morning, we _____ be sitting in traffic now!
items.translation: (Gdybyśmy wyjechali na czas dziś rano, nie siedzielibyśmy w korku teraz!)
items.explanation: Past timing affecting present! 'Had left on time' (past punctuality) → 'wouldn't be sitting' (present situation). To commute regret - late departure causing current jam. Past perfect timeliness would prevent present traffic frustration.

items.question: If I _____ lactose intolerant, I would have eaten that delicious ice cream dessert.
items.translation: (Gdybym nie był nietolerancyjny na laktozę, zjadłbym ten pyszny deser lodowy)
items.explanation: Present health condition preventing past! 'If I weren't intolerant' (current condition) → 'would have eaten' (past abstinence). To dietary limitation regret - permanent condition blocked specific past indulgence. Health restriction's effect.

items.question: If she had won the scholarship, she _____ still be studying abroad now happily!
items.translation: (Gdyby wygrała stypendium, wciąż studiowałaby za granicą teraz szczęśliwie!)
items.explanation: Past competition result affecting present! 'Had won scholarship' (past achievement) → 'would be studying' (present activity). To educational regret - imagining alternative current student life abroad. Past perfect victory would create present international experience.

name: Wzory przymiotników - zaawansowane
description: Interested in vs interesting to, bored with vs boring

items.question: I'm really _____ in learning about ancient civilizations and their cultures.
items.translation: (Jestem naprawdę zainteresowany uczeniem się o starożytnych cywilizacjach i ich kulturach)
items.explanation: 'Interested' (końcówka -ed) opisuje TWOJĄ emocję! Jesteś zainteresowany - ty odczuwasz. To o internal state - your fascination. -ED adjectives opicują feelings doświadczane - person experiencing emotion. Nie rzecz causing interest ale ty feeling interest.

items.question: The documentary about space was absolutely _____ - I learned so much!
items.translation: (Dokument o kosmosie był absolutnie interesujący - nauczyłem się tak dużo!)
items.explanation: 'Interesting' (końcówka -ing) opisuje CO wywołuje emocję! Documentary powoduje interest - it's fascinating. To o external quality. -ING adjectives opicują qualities causing feelings - thing creating emotion w others. Film was engaging - produced interest.

items.question: She felt _____ during the long boring lecture about complicated economic theory.
items.translation: (Czuła się znudzona podczas długiego nudnego wykładu o skomplikowanej teorii ekonomicznej)
items.explanation: 'Bored' (-ed) her feeling! Ona doświadcza nudy - internal state. To student experience. -ED dla person experiencing - she felt tedium. Lecture caused boredom w niej - ona recipient of boring effect.

items.question: The meeting was extremely _____ - nothing new or interesting was discussed at all.
items.translation: (Spotkanie było ekstremalnie nudne - nic nowego lub ciekawego nie było omawiane wcale)
items.explanation: 'Boring meeting' (-ing) causing boredom! Meeting is source - creates tedium w attendees. To o external quality. -ING dla thing causing feeling - meeting produced boredom. Content was tedious - meeting's characteristic.

items.question: I was _____ by the magician's incredible performance at the talent show!
items.translation: (Byłem zachwycony występem magika na talent show!)
items.explanation: 'Amazed' (-ed) twoje reaction! Ty doświadczyłeś wonder - internal response. To audience reaction. -ED dla experiencing person - you felt amazement. Performance caused awe w tobie - you're recipient wonderful experience.

items.question: The magic tricks were absolutely _____ - everyone gasped in surprise loudly!
items.translation: (Sztuczki magiczne były absolutnie zadziwiające - wszyscy westchnęli w zaskoczeniu głośno!)
items.explanation: 'Amazing tricks' (-ing) causing wonder! Tricks są source - create amazement. To performance quality. -ING dla thing causing feeling - tricks produced wonder w audience. Their quality was stunning - tricks' characteristic.

items.question: He's very _____ with his current boring job and wants to find new challenges.
items.translation: (Jest bardzo niezadowolony ze swojej obecnej nudnej pracy i chce znaleźć nowe wyzwania)
items.explanation: 'Frustrated' (-ed) jego uczucie! On doświadcza frustracji - emotional state. To career dissatisfaction. -ED dla person feeling - he experiences frustration. Job causes frustration w nim - he's suffering from lack of fulfillment.

items.question: Dealing with bureaucracy is extremely _____ and time-consuming for everyone involved.
items.translation: (Radzenie sobie z biurokracją jest ekstremalnie frustrujące i czasochłonne dla wszystkich zaangażowanych)
items.explanation: 'Frustrating bureaucracy' (-ing) causing annoyance! System powoduje frustration - external quality. To universal complaint. -ING dla thing causing feeling - bureaucracy produces frustration w people. System's characteristic - creates irritation.

items.question: I'm _____ about the results of the important medical test tomorrow morning.
items.translation: (Jestem zmartwiony o wyniki ważnego testu medycznego jutro rano)
items.explanation: 'Worried' (-ed) twój stan! Ty odczuwasz anxiety - internal emotion. To health concern. -ED dla person experiencing - you feel worry. Test results uncertain causing worry w tobie - anticipatory anxiety.

items.question: The news about the accident was very _____ to all family members present.
items.translation: (Wiadomość o wypadku była bardzo niepokojąca dla wszystkich członków rodziny obecnych)
items.explanation: 'Worrying news' (-ing) causing concern! Wiadomość is source - creates anxiety. To external quality. -ING dla thing causing feeling - news produces worry. Information's characteristic - disturbing nature causing concern.

items.question: She was _____ to hear about her friend's success in the competition yesterday!
items.translation: (Była zachwycona usłyszeć o sukcesie swojej przyjaciółki w zawodach wczoraj!)
items.explanation: 'Delighted' (-ed) her emotion! Ona cieszy się - internal joy. To vicarious happiness. -ED dla person feeling - she experiences delight. Friend's success causing joy w niej - happy dla others. Positive emotional response.

items.question: The news about the promotion was _____ to everyone in the office today!
items.translation: (Wiadomość o awansie była zachwycająca dla wszystkich w biurze dzisiaj!)
items.explanation: 'Delightful news' (-ful variant) causing joy! News is source - creates happiness. To external quality. -FUL similar do -ING - thing possessing quality. Announcement's nature - bringing joy. Good news characteristic.

items.question: I'm _____ by all the support I've received from friends during difficult time.
items.translation: (Jestem przytłoczony całym wsparciem które otrzymałem od przyjaciół podczas trudnego czasu)
items.explanation: 'Overwhelmed' (-ed) twoje reaction! Ty czujesz się przytłoczony - emotional state. To gratitude. -ED dla experiencing person - you feel overwhelmed. Support's abundance causing sensation - recipient of generous help.

items.question: The amount of work required is quite _____ for one person to handle alone.
items.translation: (Ilość pracy wymaganej jest całkiem przytłaczająca dla jednej osoby do obsłużenia samemu)
items.explanation: 'Overwhelming work' (-ing) causing stress! Workload is source - creates sensation of too much. To capacity concern. -ING dla thing causing feeling - work produces overwhelm. Task volume's quality - exceeding reasonable capacity.

items.question: The children were very _____ when they saw the presents under Christmas tree!
items.translation: (Dzieci były bardzo podekscytowane kiedy zobaczyły prezenty pod choinką!)
items.explanation: 'Excited children' (-ed) their emotion! Oni odczuwają excitement - internal state. To holiday joy. -ED dla people feeling - children experience excitement. Presents causing excitement w nich - they're experiencing anticipatory joy.

name: Formy: rzeczownik/czasownik/przymiotnik
description: Success/succeed/successful - transformations

items.question: Her _____ in the competition was well-deserved after months of hard training.
items.translation: (Jej sukces w zawodach był dobrze zasłużony po miesiącach ciężkiego treningu)
items.explanation: 'Success' to RZECZOWNIK - nazwa achievement! 'Her success' wymaga noun form. To o accomplishment - victory celebration. Noun forms używane jako subjects lub objects - naming thing itself. Achievement substantywizowane - konkretna rzecz którą osiągnęła.

items.question: She _____ in passing all her difficult exams with excellent grades overall!
items.translation: (Udało jej się zdać wszystkie trudne egzaminy z doskonałymi ocenami ogólnie!)
items.explanation: 'Succeeded' to CZASOWNIK - action word! 'She succeeded' potpebue verb. To o achieving - action completion. Verb forms opisują actions lub states - doing word. Accomplishment jako akcja - demonstrating achievement through verb.

items.question: He's a very _____ businessman who built his empire from nothing through work.
items.translation: (Jest bardzo odnoszącym sukcesy biznesmenem który zbudował swoje imperium z niczego przez pracę)
items.explanation: 'Successful' to PRZYMIOTNIK - describing word! 'Successful businessman' modifies noun. To characterization. Adjective forms opicują qualities - describing nouns. Achievement jako cecha - quality characterizing person.

items.question: They completed the project _____ despite all the difficulties encountered during work.
items.translation: (Ukończyli projekt pomyślnie pomimo wszystkich trudności napotkanych podczas pracy)
items.explanation: 'Successfully' to PRZYSŁÓWEK - describes HOW! 'Completed successfully' modifies verb. To manner description. Adverb forms modify verbs/adjectives - describing how action done. Achievement jako sposób - quality of completion.

items.question: The _____ of this medical treatment depends on early detection of disease.
items.translation: (Skuteczność tego leczenia medycznego zależy od wczesnego wykrycia choroby)
items.explanation: 'Effectiveness' abstract RZECZOWNIK! Quality nazwana - treatment's potency. To medical assessment. Abstract noun forms naming qualities - -ness suffix creating noun od adjective. Conceptualizing quality - treating characteristic jak thing.

items.question: This medicine is very _____ against headaches and other common pains quickly.
items.translation: (To lekarstwo jest bardzo skuteczne przeciw bólom głowy i innym powszechnym bólom szybko)
items.explanation: 'Effective' PRZYMIOTNIK describing medicine! Quality medication possesses. To pharmaceutical assessment. Adjective describing potency - how well medicine works. Characterizing drug's capability - effective nature.

items.question: The new policy will _____ everyone in the company starting next month officially.
items.translation: (Nowa polityka wpłynie na wszystkich w firmie począwszy od przyszłego miesiąca oficjalnie)
items.explanation: 'Affect' CZASOWNIK = influence! 'Will affect everyone' - action impacting. To organizational change. Verb 'affect' means wpływać - creating impact. Nie mylić z noun 'effect' (result). Action word - describing influence exerted.

items.question: The _____ of the new regulations on small businesses was significant and immediate.
items.translation: (Wpływ nowych regulacji na małe biznesy był znaczący i natychmiastowy)
items.explanation: 'Effect' RZECZOWNIK = rezultat! 'The effect' naming impact. To economic analysis. Noun 'effect' means result/impact - consequential outcome. Nie mylić z verb 'affect'. Result substantywizowany - outcome jak named thing.

items.question: He explained the complex concept very _____ so everyone could understand easily.
items.translation: (Wyjaśnił złożony koncept bardzo jasno więc wszyscy mogli zrozumieć łatwo)
items.explanation: 'Clearly' PRZYSŁÓWEK describing explanation manner! HOW explained - with clarity. To pedagogical skill. Adverb modifying verb - describing quality of explaining. Teaching effectiveness - manner ensuring comprehension.

items.question: The _____ of his explanation helped everyone understand the difficult topic finally.
items.translation: (Jasność jego wyjaśnienia pomogła wszystkim zrozumieć trudny temat w końcu)
items.explanation: 'Clarity' abstract RZECZOWNIK! Quality nazwana - clearness. To communication assessment. Abstract noun -ity suffix creating noun od adjective. Naming quality itself - treating characteristic jak substantywny concept.

items.question: She spoke _____ about her concerns during the important team meeting today.
items.translation: (Mówiła otwarcie o swoich obawach podczas ważnego spotkania zespołu dzisiaj)
items.explanation: 'Openly' PRZYSŁÓWEK - HOW spoke! Manner of speaking - with openness. To communication style. Adverb describing frankness - modifying verb (spoke). Transparency w communication - candid manner emphasized.

items.question: There's a growing _____ that we need to address climate change urgently now.
items.translation: (Jest rosnąca świadomość że musimy zająć się zmianą klimatu pilnie teraz)
items.explanation: 'Awareness' abstract RZECZOWNIK! Consciousness nazwana - realization spreading. To social change. Abstract noun -ness creating noun od adjective. Public consciousness - collective understanding developing.

items.question: Are you _____ of the risks involved in this dangerous adventure activity?
items.translation: (Czy jesteś świadomy ryzyk związanych z tą niebezpieczną aktywnością przygodową?)
items.explanation: 'Aware' PRZYMIOTNIK describing knowledge state! Are you conscious - possessing awareness. To safety check. Adjective describing mental state - possessing consciousness of dangers. Informed consent verification.

items.question: The company aims to _____ customer satisfaction through better service quality.
items.translation: (Firma dąży do zwiększenia satysfakcji klienta przez lepszą jakość obsługi)
items.explanation: 'Increase' CZASOWNIK = boost! 'To increase satisfaction' - action goal. To business objective. Infinitive verb form po 'to' - expressing intended action. Growth action - actively raising levels.

items.question: There's been an _____ in sales revenue this quarter compared to last year.
items.translation: (Był wzrost w przychodach ze sprzedaży w tym kwartale w porównaniu do zeszłego roku)
items.explanation: 'An increase' RZECZOWNIK naming change! 'An increase' - rise itself. To quarterly report. Noun form naming phenomenon - growth jak thing. Quantifiable change substantywizowany - treating rise jak countable event.

name: Opuszczanie zaimków względnych
description: Kiedy możesz pominąć who/which/that

items.question: The book _____ I'm reading is absolutely fascinating and beautifully written!
items.translation: (Książka którą czytam jest absolutnie fascynująca i pięknie napisana!)
items.explanation: Możesz OPUŚCIĆ relative pronoun gdy jest object! 'The book I'm reading' = 'the book that I'm reading'. Pronoun optional jako object. To o concise speech - natives often drop. When relative pronoun is object clause, English allows omission - smoother flow.

items.question: The man _____ lives next door is a famous musician and composer internationally.
items.translation: (Mężczyzna który mieszka obok jest słynnym muzykiem i kompozytorem międzynarodowo)
items.explanation: NIE możesz opuścić gdy pronoun jest PODMIOT! 'The man lives' incomplete - needs 'who'. To o identification. When relative pronoun jest subject clause, nie może być dropped - grammatically necessary. Subject pronouns essential.

items.question: This is the restaurant _____ we went to for our anniversary dinner celebration.
items.translation: (To jest restauracja do której poszliśmy na naszą rocznicową kolację)
items.explanation: Możesz pominąć gdy object of preposition (na końcu)! 'The restaurant we went to' = 'that we went to'. To natural speech. Gdy przyimek kończy clause, pronoun droppable - very common w casual English. Smooth conversational style.

items.question: The woman _____ I told you about yesterday got the promotion she deserved!
items.translation: (Kobieta o której ci mówiłem wczoraj dostała awans którego zasługiwała!)
items.explanation: Object pronoun droppable! 'The woman I told you about' natural bez 'who/that'. To conversational. Przyimek 'about' na końcu allows pronoun omission - natives frequently drop w informal speech. Streamlined communication.

items.question: The people _____ are waiting outside can come in now to the warm building.
items.translation: (Ludzie którzy czekają na zewnątrz mogą wejść teraz do ciepłego budynku)
items.explanation: Subject pronoun obowiązkowy! 'People are waiting' needs 'who' - can't drop. To instruction. Subject relative pronouns grammatically essential - sentence incomplete bez. Identifying specific group requiring pronoun.

items.question: Everything _____ he said at the meeting turned out to be completely accurate.
items.translation: (Wszystko co powiedział na spotkaniu okazało się być całkowicie dokładne)
items.explanation: Po 'everything' możesz pominąć 'that'! 'Everything he said' = 'everything that he said'. To validation. Indefinite pronouns (everything/something) allow dropping following 'that' gdy object - conversational economy. Confirmation statement.

items.question: The house _____ is for sale belongs to my elderly retired neighbors next door.
items.translation: (Dom który jest na sprzedaż należy do moich starszych emerytowanych sąsiadów obok)
items.explanation: Subject 'that' obowiązkowy! 'The house is' needs relative pronoun - can't drop. To real estate info. Subject pronouns essential - bez nich sentence grammatically broken. Property identification requiring pronoun.

items.question: The movie _____ we watched last night was better than I expected honestly!
items.translation: (Film który obejrzeliśmy wczoraj wieczorem był lepszy niż oczekiwałem szczerze!)
items.explanation: Object pronoun optional! 'Movie we watched' perfectly fine bez 'that/which'. To review. Natives habitually drop object relatives - sounds more natural w conversation. Film evaluation streamlined.

items.question: There's something _____ I need to tell you about our project status urgently.
items.translation: (Jest coś co muszę ci powiedzieć o statusie naszego projektu pilnie)
items.explanation: Po 'something' możesz drop 'that'! 'Something I need' = 'something that I need'. To urgent announcement. Indefinite pronouns allowing omission gdy 'that' jako object - casual speech pattern. Preparing dla important information.

items.question: The person _____ won the lottery wants to remain completely anonymous publicly.
items.translation: (Osoba która wygrała loterię chce pozostać całkowicie anonimowa publicznie)
items.explanation: Subject pronoun required! 'Person won' incomplete - needs 'who/that'. To news story. Subject relatives essential - grammatically konieczne. Winner identification requiring pronoun. Can't drop subject pronouns.

items.question: The keys _____ you're looking for are on the kitchen table right now.
items.translation: (Klucze których szukasz są na kuchennym stole właśnie teraz)
items.explanation: Object of 'looking for' droppable! 'Keys you're looking for' natural bez pronoun. To helpful locating. Przyimek ending allows omission - very common pattern. Finding lost items - direct communication.

items.question: The advice _____ she gave me was incredibly helpful during difficult decision.
items.translation: (Rada którą mi dała była niesamowicie pomocna podczas trudnej decyzji)
items.explanation: Object pronoun optional! 'Advice she gave' works perfectly bez 'that'. To gratitude. Dropping object relatives common - streamlines sentence. Appreciation statement - acknowledging helpful guidance.

items.question: Anyone _____ needs help should raise their hand and ask immediately without hesitation.
items.translation: (Każdy kto potrzebuje pomocy powinien podnieść rękę i zapytać natychmiast bez wahania)
items.explanation: Subject pronoun obowiązkowy! 'Anyone needs' incomplete - must have 'who'. To classroom instruction. Subject relatives can't be dropped - grammatically essential. Open invitation requiring subject pronoun.

items.question: The song _____ is playing right now is my absolute favorite of all time!
items.translation: (Piosenka która gra właśnie teraz jest moją absolutną ulubioną wszech czasów!)
items.explanation: Subject pronoun required! 'Song is playing' needs relative pronoun - can't omit. To music appreciation. Subject pronouns grammatically necessary - sentence incomplete bez. Current music identification.

items.question: I can't find the email _____ you sent me yesterday about the meeting details.
items.translation: (Nie mogę znaleźć emaila którego wysłałeś mi wczoraj o szczegółach spotkania)
items.explanation: Object pronoun droppable! 'Email you sent' perfectly clear bez 'that'. To searching. Object relatives commonly omitted - natural speech. Looking dla correspondence - streamlined question.
